quickAbout.heading: A Quick
paragraphs: I'm a developer and builder who loves creating things that live at the intersection of design and technology. I care deeply about the details, from pixel-perfect UIs to clean, maintainable code.
Whether it's automating workflows with AI, building beautiful web experiences, or experimenting with new technologies, I'm always looking for the next thing to build.

about.heading: Hey, I'm
bio: I am a data analyst and developer who loves creating things that matter. I believe the best software is built at the intersection of thoughtful design and solid engineering, and that's where I like to live.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me messing with hardware, tearing down a engine, or figuring out how to automate something that probably didn't need to be automated (but it's cooler now).
I care about the craft. Every pixel, every excel row, every animation, every line of code. The details are what make something feel right.

projects.heading: Things I've
projects.description: A collection of projects that showcase my work in web development, AI, and developer tooling.

items.title: FloUwer
items.description: AI-powered (LLM and vision) browser with workflow automation and intelligent browsing capabilities.
items.longDescription: An Electron-based browser that records user workflows, replays them with AI intelligence, and supports multiple LLM providers for smart automation.

items.title: ImranWafa.com
items.description: The site you're on right now, built with React, Framer Motion, and a couple easter eggs :).
items.longDescription: A personal portfolio built with React and Framer Motion, featuring a unique iMessage-based contact page, smooth page transitions, and rich scroll-triggered animations.

items.title: JabBit
items.description: Single page workflow automation extension for chromium based browsers.
items.longDescription: An automation tool that streamlines workflows by auto-filling forms, and managing the entire workflow.

items.title: miLoader
items.description: Real-time resource load manager for macOS.
items.longDescription: A lightweight macOS daemon that monitors system resources in real time and uses machine learning to predict usage spikes before they happen — automatically rebalancing memory allocation and throttling runaway processes to keep your machine responsive.

items.title: Component Library
items.description: A curated set of reusable React components with animations.
items.longDescription: Design system and component library featuring accessible, animated components built with Radix UI primitives and Framer Motion.

items.title: CLI Toolkit
items.description: Developer productivity tools for the command line.
items.longDescription: A collection of CLI utilities for common development tasks including scaffolding, code generation, and project management.
